_source: MITRE ATLAS techniques.json snapshot for AEGIS dev/test

techniques.name: LLM Prompt Injection
techniques.description: An adversary may craft malicious prompts to a large language model to manipulate it to perform actions outside of its safety guardrails, including indirect prompt injection where the malicious instructions arrive via untrusted retrieved content.

techniques.name: Full ML Model Access
techniques.description: An adversary with full access to a deployed ML model can probe it to extract information, generate adversarial examples, or otherwise interact with the model in ways the developer did not intend.

techniques.name: Spoof ML Output
techniques.description: An adversary may attempt to spoof the output of a deployed ML model by manipulating downstream UI or generation pipelines so that a benign model output is replaced with attacker-controlled content. This includes deepfake generation for impersonation in voice or video channels.

techniques.name: Deprecated technique example
techniques.description: Sample to verify deprecated entries are skipped.
